messages.content:
帮我翻译一下
This is an urgent reminder that your reviews for the ARR January 2026 cycle are now overdue. The deadline was February 7th AOE and has just passed. We need all your reviews as soon as possible. Please note that the author response period begins on February 15th, requiring all papers to have received at least three reviews by the end of February 14th AoE.
To check your assignments, please go to  
https://openreview.net/group?id=aclweb.org/ACL/ARR/2026/January/Reviewers#reviewer-tasks
Please keep in mind that as per our new policies, **highly irresponsible reviewers and ACs may have their papers desk rejected, become ineligible from committing their paper(s) to *CL conferences or (re-)submitting any work for the duration of the the next ARR cycle**. For ACs, this means that meta-reviews need to be submitted on time and in accordance with the guidelines. In case of any emergencies, the chairs should be warned via the emergency declaration form. More details on the policy here: https://aclrollingreview.org/incentives2026.
If you have already arranged with the AC when you would submit your reviews, or you’re helping with emergency reviews, please ignore this email.
Otherwise, please let the AC and SAC know ASAP when you expect to complete the remaining reviews (ideally by today). This should be done by leaving an official comment in the forum of the affected paper, so that ACs are notified, and also SACs and editors can also see what your status is. Do NOT email the editors about this, since the AC will not see such emails. See detailed instructions on how to contact ACs at https://aclrollingreview.org/reviewerguidelines#q-how-do-i-contact-the-area-chair
If you have a personal emergency that prevents you from completing your tasks, please submit an emergency declaration form: https://aclrollingreview.org/reviewerguidelines#q-what-should-i-do-if-i-cannot-complete-my-assignment-due-to-a-personal-emergency
Detailed instructions for the review process are available here:  
https://aclrollingreview.org/reviewerguidelines
Your timely contributions and prompt notice of personal emergencies is critical for the success of the ARR platform. Thanks in advance for your help!
If you need to get in touch specifically with the ARR EiC team, and not the ACs/SACs, please send a message via email: editors@aclrollingreview.org.

这是一个紧急提醒：您在 ARR 2026 年 1 月轮次的评审目前已逾期。截止时间为 AOE 时间 2 月 7 日，现已刚刚过去。我们需要您尽快提交所有评审。请注意，作者回复期将于 2 月 15 日开始，这要求所有论文在 AOE 时间 2 月 14 日结束前至少收到三份评审。

要查看您的分配任务，请访问：  
https://openreview.net/group?id=aclweb.org/ACL/ARR/2026/January/Reviewers#reviewer-tasks

请牢记，根据我们的新政策，**高度不负责任的审稿人和 AC（领域主席）可能会导致其论文被直接拒稿（desk reject），并在接下来的一个 ARR 轮次期间失去将论文提交至 *CL 会议或（重新）提交任何工作的资格**。对于 AC 而言，这意味着需要按时并遵循指南提交元评审（meta-review）。如遇紧急情况，应通过紧急声明表告知主席。政策详情见： https://aclrollingreview.org/incentives2026。

如果您已经与 AC 协商好何时提交评审，或您正在协助进行紧急评审，请忽略此邮件。

否则，请尽快（最好今天之内）告知 AC 和 SAC（高级领域主席）您预计何时完成剩余评审。请在相关论文的论坛中留下正式评论来完成此事，以便 AC 收到通知，同时 SAC 和编辑也能看到您的进度状态。不要给编辑发邮件说明此事，因为 AC 看不到此类邮件。关于如何联系 AC 的详细说明见：  
https://aclrollingreview.org/reviewerguidelines#q-how-do-i-contact-the-area-chair

如果您有个人紧急情况导致无法完成任务，请提交紧急声明表：  
https://aclrollingreview.org/reviewerguidelines#q-what-should-i-do-if-i-cannot-complete-my-assignment-due-to-a-personal-emergency

评审流程的详细说明见：  
https://aclrollingreview.org/reviewerguidelines

您按时的贡献以及对个人紧急情况的及时告知，对 ARR 平台的成功至关重要。先行感谢您的帮助！

如果您需要专门联系 ARR 主编（EiC）团队（而不是 AC/SAC），请通过电子邮件发送消息至：editors@aclrollingreview.org。
